title: More Road
description: Adds road signs and street furniture to Minecraft.
body:
# MORE ROAD

![MORE ROAD (LOGO)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f8f0a49bd8241e9c5d707bb2f3df9ea8ce4aad2.jpeg)

More Road is a Minecraft mod that adds a wide range of realistic road infrastructure inspired by French street furniture: traffic signs (STOP, No Entry, etc.), lampposts, road markings, bollards, posts, safety barriers, and more. Ideal for building immersive cities and realistic roads!
